title: When Making Future Plans: - Pause: Ask,
subtitle: Think Beyond Your Current Self
description:
When making future plans:
- Pause: Ask, "Will future me feel the same way?"
- Imagine different scenarios: Consider how changes in mood, priorities, or environment might affect your choices.
- Build flexibility: Leave room to adapt as your preferences evolve.

Example: Booking a gym membership? Think about whether your motivation will match your current enthusiasm in a month.

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Pause and Reflect
howTo.summary: Before making a commitment, take 10-30 seconds to pause and ask yourself, 'Will future me feel the same way in 30 days?' This helps convert impulse into thoughtful prediction.

howTo.title: Prototype Your Commitment
howTo.summary: Design a small trial related to your commitment, such as a 7-14 day test. This allows you to measure actual engagement and preferences before making a longer-term decision.

howTo.title: Negotiate Flexibility
howTo.summary: When committing, opt for flexible plans like monthly subscriptions instead of annual ones. This allows you to adjust based on your evolving preferences and reduces regret.

howTo.title: Set Re-evaluation Dates
howTo.summary: For commitments longer than 30 days, set specific re-evaluation dates in your calendar. Assess whether the commitment is still valuable and if you want to continue.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app to track your progress and insights. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/future-self-planning-check/.
